story: Heard them busking outside a coffeeshop in Burlington. Bought twenty dollars of merch on the spot and went home a fan.
Driving home from a bartending shift
column7: this came on the radio. I pulled over to listen to the end before I went inside.

story: Discovered it on a 4 AM drive across Nevada. The slowest nine minutes of my life
Played this on the deck of a fishing boat off the Alaska coast. Everyone went quiet by the second verse.
I learned guitar to this song. Took a year to get the solo right. Still drop a note here and there.
